Home/Services/Structured cabling

Structured cabling

Structured cabling for commercial buildings and business environments

Opticable installs the structured cabling that supports your security, wireless, network, and communication systems. A clean, well-organized, documented installation that makes maintenance and future additions easier.

Request a quoteView all services

Services

Cat 5e, Cat 6, Cat 6A, coaxial, patch panels, testing, and documentation for a clean, durable network foundation.

Structured cabling

What we install

  • Cat 5e, Cat 6, and Cat 6A copper cabling for workstations, WiFi access points, IP cameras, readers, and network equipment
  • Coaxial cabling for analog cameras, antennas, and existing signal distribution systems
  • Short-distance fiber optic links for connecting network rooms, floors, or remote zones
  • Patch panels for cable arrivals that stay organized, labeled, and ready for future growth

Practical use

What it supports in practice

  • PoE WiFi access points over Cat 6
  • IP cameras connected back to the NVR
  • Access-control readers wired to the control panel
  • IP phone handsets and office devices
  • Network equipment in the technical room

Quality

What a clean installation actually means

Cables labeled at both ends, pathways secured properly, organized patch panels, and a network room that any technician can understand without rediscovering everything from scratch.

Process

How the work is handled

  • 01 - Site survey: areas to cable, available pathways, and building constraints.
  • 02 - Cabling plan: number of points, run lengths, cable type, and network-room organization.
  • 03 - Structured installation: cable pulling, patch-panel termination, and full identification of every point.
  • 04 - Testing and certification: every point is tested and the point list is handed over.

Request a quote

Do you have a cabling project or a network room that needs to be organized? Tell us the square footage, point count, and building type.

Opticable serves commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.

Request a quote

Promo

Want to lock in a code before requesting a quote?

Use the promo entry page to collect your one-time code, then continue into the normal commercial quote flow with a better-qualified lead.

Services

Related services

Related services that often support the same technology roadmap.

Fiber optic

Backbone links, risers, service extensions, and high-capacity fiber runs for commercial buildings.

View service

Network infrastructure

Racks, patch panels, technical rooms, internet-entry management, and network support for environments that are easier to operate.

View service

Commercial WiFi

Coverage planning, professional access points, maintenance, and support for wireless networks in commercial buildings.

View service

Security cameras

IP cameras, PoE, NVRs, remote viewing, and ongoing support to protect sensitive areas, common spaces, perimeters, and entries.

View service

Access control

Readers, locks, panels, door cabling, and ongoing access administration for lobbies, entries, and restricted areas.

View service

Intercom

Audio or video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entries, integrated with access control and the network.

View service

IT services

Device management, network support, maintenance, and technical support for your environment after installation.

View service

IP telephony

Business telephony, SIP lines, handsets, VoIP cabling, and network support for commercial offices.

View service

Opticable installs and manages technology systems for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.
